name: Runny Butter Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sprinkle raisins evenly in baked shells.
3. In a bowl, cream together butter and brown sugar until light.
4. Beat in corn syrup, egg, vinegar, vanilla, and salt until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into pastry shells, filling each about three-quarters full.
6. Bake in the 400°F oven for about 10 minutes or just until runny in the center.
7. Let cool in the pan for one minute before transferring to a rack to cool completely.
8. Makes 16 tarts.
